Good to know: A 50% deposit secures your wedding date, with the balance due 3 days prior. A minimum spend of R2500 applies for us to close the salon and travel to your venue — travel costs billed at AA rates. Brides provide their own veils, hairpieces & jewellery; we provide all pins and styling tools.

Booking Details

  1. Travel rates for our stylist are based on AA rates.
  2. A minimum of R2500 is required to close the salon and travel to your wedding venue.
  3. A 50% deposit is required upon booking to secure your wedding date.
  4. The remaining balance must be settled three days prior to the wedding date.
  5. Any additional travel expenses incurred will be communicated and billed accordingly.
  6. Changes to the booking must be made at least one week in advance.
  7. The bride is responsible for providing her own accessories — veils, hairpieces & jewellery.
  8. Specific accessory requests should be communicated to the stylist prior to the wedding day.
